samp_mat_process: Water samples were collected via the McLane Phytoplankton and Particle Samplers intake port, and then were immediately filtered through a 0.40 micron PCTE membrane disc filter
prep_method_additional: The automated sampler filters the samples immediately upon collection, then the disc filter was flushed with 73 mL of 96% ethanol. In their filter holders, the samples sat at sea temperature until the sampler collection date. Once recovered, the disc filters were removed, stored in 5 mL tubes which were filled with 5 mL 96% molecular grade ethanol and stored in a -20 freezer until extraction.
nucl_acid_ext_kit: Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
nucl_acid_ext_modify: Modified for disc filters, reagent volume altered
concentration_method: Qubit Fluorometer v.4 dsDNA high sensitivity kit
nucl_acid_ext_method_additional: Extractions completed in a Biosafety Cabinet for sterility purposes.
samp_collect_notes: Automated sampler deployed on 2021-08-25 and recovered on 2021-10-08
DepthInMeters_method: Reported depth based on length of mooring tether from anchor to water inlet, assuming no current.
tot_depth_water_col_method: Looked up in the GEBCO 2024 bathymetric dataset using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates.
measurements_from: Environmental parameters (temp, oxy_mg, and sal) were recorded by an oceanographic mooring colocated at the respective sampling site (42 m). These data were ground-truthed using deployment and recovery CTD casts performed at each specific mooring location. Altitude and tot_depth_water_col were calculated using the methods described in the field's corresponding method field. If not specified in the corresponding method field, then the field was measured.
altitude_method: Calculated by subtracting the maximumDepthInMeters from the tot_depth_water_col.

Altitude and tot_depth_water_col were calculated using the methods described in the field's corresponding method field. If not specified in the corresponding method field, then the field was measured.
altitude_method: Calculated by subtracting the maximumDepthInMeters from the tot_depth_water_col.

samp_mat_process: Water samples were collected via the McLane Phytoplankton and Particle Samplers intake port, and then were immediately filtered through a 0.40 micron PCTE membrane disc filter
prep_method_additional: The automated sampler filters the samples immediately upon collection, then the disc filter was flushed with 73 mL of 96% ethanol. In their filter holders, the samples sat at sea temperature until the sampler collection date. Once recovered, the disc filters were removed, stored in 5 mL tubes which were filled with 5 mL 96% molecular grade ethanol and stored in a -20 freezer until extraction.

tot_depth_water_col_method: Looked up in the GEBCO 2024 bathymetric dataset using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates.
measurements_from: Environmental parameters (temp, oxy_mg, and sal) were recorded by an oceanographic mooring colocated at the respective sampling site (42 m). These data were ground-truthed using deployment and recovery CTD casts performed at each specific mooring location. Altitude and tot_depth_water_col were calculated using the methods described in the field's corresponding method field. If not specified in the corresponding method field, then the field was measured.
altitude_method: Calculated by subtracting the maximumDepthInMeters from the tot_depth_water_col.

samp_mat_process: Water samples were collected via the McLane Phytoplankton and Particle Samplers intake port, and then were immediately filtered through a 0.40 micron PCTE membrane disc filter
prep_method_additional: The automated sampler filters the samples immediately upon collection, then the disc filter was flushed with 73 mL of 96% ethanol. In their filter holders, the samples sat at sea temperature until the sampler collection date. Once recovered, the disc filters were removed, stored in 5 mL tubes which were filled with 5 mL 96% molecular grade ethanol and stored in a -20 freezer until extraction.
nucl_acid_ext_kit: Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
nucl_acid_ext_modify: Modified for disc filters, reagent volume altered
concentration_method: Qubit Fluorometer v.4 dsDNA high sensitivity kit
nucl_acid_ext_method_additional: Extractions completed in a Biosafety Cabinet for sterility purposes.

nucl_acid_ext_method_additional: Extractions completed in a Biosafety Cabinet for sterility purposes.
samp_collect_notes: Automated sampler deployed on 2022-06-21 and recovered on 2022-07-19
DepthInMeters_method: Reported depth based on length of mooring tether from anchor to water inlet, assuming no current.
tot_depth_water_col_method: Looked up in the GEBCO 2024 bathymetric dataset using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates.
measurements_from: Environmental parameters (temp, oxy_mg, and sal) were recorded by an oceanographic mooring colocated at the respective sampling site (42 m). These data were ground-truthed using deployment and recovery CTD casts performed at each specific mooring location. Altitude and tot_depth_water_col were calculated using the methods described in the field's corresponding method field. If not specified in the corresponding method field, then the field was measured.
altitude_method: Calculated by subtracting the maximumDepthInMeters from the tot_depth_water_col.

samp_mat_process: Water samples were collected via the McLane Phytoplankton and Particle Samplers intake port, and then were immediately filtered through a 0.40 micron PCTE membrane disc filter
prep_method_additional: The automated sampler filters the samples immediately upon collection, then the disc filter was flushed with 73 mL of 96% ethanol. In their filter holders, the samples sat at sea temperature until the sampler collection date. Once recovered, the disc filters were removed, stored in 5 mL tubes which were filled with 5 mL 96% molecular grade ethanol and stored in a -20 freezer until extraction.
